steps.title: Identify the sine ratio
steps.content: For angle $x^\circ$, the opposite side is the vertical leg with length $28$, and the hypotenuse is $c$.

steps.title: Match the numerator
steps.content: Use opposite over hypotenuse: $$\sin(x^\circ)=\frac{28}{c}$$ The question gives $\sin(x^\circ)=\frac{k}{c}$, so $k=28$. The answer is 28.
